task_frame_summary: The basic proposal-only path remains right, but the phrasing around downstream usefulness tempts a scope reading that is broader than the evidence supports.
assumed_goal: Keep the case inside the proposal path while resisting borrowed certainty about downstream destinations.
explicit_constraints: Do not infer runtime or truth-facing follow-through.
Treat downstream value as descriptive rather than authoritative.
latent_frame_risks: Readers may infer broader destination readiness from a clean proposal conversion.
Useful-looking proposal language may suppress explicit boundary reminders.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which future destination is actually grounded versus merely imaginable?
Where would the current phrasing invite more confidence than the bounded case justifies?
frame_risk_signals: downstream usefulness is easy to overread
boundary language is weaker than the conversion cleanliness suggests
